properties.description: Horizontal bilingual subtitle rendering workflow: takes video + bilingual SRT, outputs horizontal_bilingual.mp4.
Horizontal dubbed video rendering workflow: takes dubbed video + target language SRT, uses --dubbed flag.
Vertical bilingual short-subtitle rendering workflow: converts video to portrait, adds short bilingual subtitles and titles.
Vertical dubbed video rendering workflow: takes dubbed video + target language SRT with titles.
Subtitle generation workflow: downloads media, generates captions via platform or Whisper, translates, produces SRT files and manifest.
TTS dubbing workflow: synthesizes speech from SRT, optionally embeds into video, produces audio and video outputs.

nodes.name: krillinai-render-horizontal

nodes.description: Render portrait videos with KrillinAI CLI, including converting source video to vertical format, adding short bilingual subtitles, rendering dubbed vertical videos, and checking vertical subtitle readability.

nodes.description: Generate subtitles with KrillinAI CLI from a YouTube link, Bilibili/local video, or existing media, including platform caption download, Whisper fallback, translation, bilingual SRT, and short vertical subtitle output.

nodes.description: Generate target-language dubbing with KrillinAI CLI from SRT subtitles, including TTS audio creation and optional dubbed video generation.
